meaning: n.三角州,德耳塔(希腊字母的第四个字)
examples: Sand has silted up the river delta.
The delta region of the Rio Grande river was a forsaken land of thickets and swamps.
The Nile divides at its mouth and forms a delta.
Michael Pento is chief economist at Delta Global Advisors and a contributor to greenfaucet.com.
When going up against zombies with a slow and deliberate trod, the Delta Six got the job done.
